text:
ふふっ。泣いても笑っても次が正真正銘
最後のミッション。後悔なきよう
全力を尽くしてくださいませ。

既にご覧になられていると思いますが
最後に待ち構えるエネミーも
いつもと違いますわ。

Win or lose, this next mission is the very last
one of all. Give it every last ounce of
strength you've got. No regrets!

You may have seen as much already, but the
enemies that await you now are unlike
anything you have faced before. Best of luck.
